codeReview.summary: The feature implementation matches the requested Alpine.js + UnoCSS SPA behavior and integrates correctly with existing web API endpoints. I found one minor UI formatting edge case, but no blocking correctness, security, or regression issues in this commit.

issues.description: Timestamp tenths are computed with `Math.round((secs % 1) * 10)`, which can produce `10` for values near the next second (e.g., `12.96` -> `00:12.10`). This yields malformed timestamp text in the UI; clamp/carry logic should normalize this edge case.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `web-worker` skill procedure is overly rigid for frontend-only features: it mandates writing API tests first, but this feature correctly focused on static frontend work and was still marked as having followed procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/web-worker/SKILL.md:27 requires "Write API tests first (RED)"; /Users/sdawka/.factory/missions/7ede5099-a0c6-4479-99e9-87a13afef6d2/handoffs/2026-04-10T22-27-57-250Z__web-frontend__c92c2a36-ecff-4c1e-a1a6-f8bfb9442d14.json:73 reports `"added": []` and :78 reports `"followedProcedure": true`.

summary: Reviewed feature web-frontend at commit fe6d96e. Implementation is functionally complete and aligned with expected web-ui behavior, with one non-blocking timestamp-display edge case and one skill-procedure documentation gap noted.
